semantics: expect-failure; a surviving mutation or a wrong-condition kill fails the suite

mutations.description: claim a later state (T09) for an envelope whose earliest match is T03 (duplicate); first-match order broken
a refusal (T10) marked with denominator_retained=false shrinks the fixed denominator
a raw Python float appears in a canonical scoring record
0.0000005 claimed as 0.000001 (HALF_UP) instead of 0.000000 (HALF_EVEN, 0 is even)
0.0999995 quantizes to 0.100000 == 0.10 but the exact rational is strictly below; comparison on quantized decimals
a=2,b=3 banked as 3 instead of the exact mean 5/2 (|a-b|=1 tie rule)
a=2,b=5 (|a-b|=3>1) banked without the mandatory adjudication
an L2 record fed where the aggregation formula requires L1 inputs
a mixed-level aggregation input list (an L1 among L2s) where L2 is required
a committed projection carries the arm label in cleartext instead of a salted digest
a scorer-visible packet exposes a (swapped) arm label
a score record missing the rubric hash provenance field
a register forges an eligibility flag while a scoring-facing slot is unresolved
a post-unblinding exclusion moves results toward a substantive branch (B-NOTATION)
the census accounts for 311 of 312 scheduled cells; a cell was deleted, not census-classed
an incomplete pair fills its missing arm by imputation
bootstrap seed drifts from the frozen 1729
bootstrap iterations drift from the frozen 800
a local branch verdict disagrees with the delegated analyze.py encoding (predicate re-encoding)
T13 (unparseable) given disposition SCORE instead of SCORE-ZERO-DISCHARGE
a duplicate (T03) accepted for SCORE instead of QUARANTINE-INTEGRITY
a replayed response (T04) accepted for SCORE instead of QUARANTINE-INTEGRITY
a safety refusal (T09) misclassified as a plain refusal (T10)
an unclassifiable valid envelope (real T99) claimed as a scored T15
a tampered freeze-manifest fails the §0 bank-binding sha256 recomputation
